name: Cap'n's Cookies
recipeIngredient: 2 cups CAP'N CRUNCH Cereal, any flavor, coarsely crushed
1 cup Raisins or semi-sweet chocolate pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease a cookie sheet lightly.
3. In a large bowl, beat together the brown sugar and margarine until fluffy.
4. Add eggs and vanilla; mix well.
5. Stir in flour, baking powder, and salt; mix until combined.
6. Fold in cereal and raisins.
7. Drop rounded teaspoonfuls of dough onto prepared cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 10-12 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
9. Let cool on the cookie sheet for 2 minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
10. Allow cookies to cool completely before storing tightly covered.
Makes about 3 dozen cookies.
